subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still on the wet sidewalk curb by a slush ridge, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing an open winter coat over a long-sleeve shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Warm winter attire with the coat worn open, plus dark trousers, scarf, and waterproof boots; the open coat keeps the bold stop sign graphic fully visible on the chest against the grey murk.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: Open winter coat over a long-sleeve shirt printed with a red stop sign, dark trousers, scarf, waterproof boots.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, attentive gaze toward the vehicle.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Fair skin tone with a cold-flushed, dimly lit complexion under flat sleet-grey light.
subjects.facial_features: Light hair damp with sleet, light eyes, relaxed brow, breath faintly visible in the cold, no distinguishing marks at distance.

background_setting: A Scandinavian urban intersection under dim overcast winter light with falling sleet. The two-lane slushy wet road with grey slush ridges along the curb is bordered by wet sidewalks, mid-rise buildings, traffic signals, bare trees, and lamp posts already glowing dully in the murk. Sleet streaks down and slush sprays from tires; a few bundled pedestrians appear faintly, conveying a cold, murky winter intersection scene.

lighting.conditions: Dim, murky overcast winter light with falling sleet; lamps dully lit.
lighting.direction: Flat cold grey light from the low overcast sky with weak lamp fill from the right, front-lighting the pedestrian.
lighting.shadows: Nearly shadowless in the flat murk; wet slushy road gives dull, low reflections.
lighting.illumination_effect: Flat cold grey illumination with low visibility; the red stop sign shirt graphic reads as the strongest color against the murky sleet.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective toward the slushy intersection, the pedestrian on the right wet sidewalk by a slush ridge; dulled lane lines and signals lead toward the murky vanishing point.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cold greys and dull browns of slush and overcast sky, wet dark buildings, dully glowing lamps, with the red stop sign on the shirt as the single vivid accent.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating slush ridges, glowing traffic signals, and bare trees along the murky street.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the near slushy road and the pedestrian, with the murky sleet-blurred intersection softening beyond.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario at a sleety Scandinavian urban intersection demonstrating a stationary pedestrian on the curb with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward toward the Scandinavian urban intersection under dim sleet; the pedestrian appears ahead on the right slushy sidewalk, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt beneath an open coat.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed through the falling sleet; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary by the slush ridge.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed on the slushy wet road; the pedestrian remains on the curb and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's long-sleeve shirt, framed by the open coat and reading clearly against the murky sleet-grey backdrop.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on a slushy wet road under dim overcast light and falling sleet, approaching the stationary pedestrian on the right sidewalk by a slush ridge whose shirt displays a stop sign beneath an open coat.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches through the murky sleet; vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view with low sleet-blurred visibility.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains on the slushy curb and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and out of frame; vehicle maintains speed and lane position on the slushy road.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a murky Scandinavian urban intersection of slushy wet road with grey slush ridges under falling sleet, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward; a pedestrian stands on the right sidewalk by a slush ridge facing the camera, a red stop sign clearly printed on their shirt beneath an open coat. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed, remaining planted by the slush ridge. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before leaving frame as the slushy intersection continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient cold sleety intersection driving sounds: a steady engine hum, the wet slushy hiss and spray of tires, sleet ticking down, and a muffled grey city murmur. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive through sleet.
